snapshots.label: 2026 甲虫年 · 浩劫与重生上线
snapshots.labelEn: Year of the Beetle · Cataclysm Launch
snapshots.description: 甲虫年标准快照：移除威兹班的工坊、胜地历险记、深暗领域，加入浩劫与重生。
snapshots.descriptionEn: Year of the Beetle Standard snapshot: rotates out Whizbang's Workshop, Perils in Paradise, and The Great Dark Beyond; adds Cataclysm.

snapshots.label: 2026 拓展包上线前
snapshots.description: 当前成品快照，包含 2026 首个新拓展包上线前的标准环境。
snapshots.descriptionEn: Current playable snapshot before the first 2026 expansion and rotation update.
